name: io.github.live-direct-marketing/inbox-check
description: Email inbox placement tests across Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, Mail.ru, Yandex (SPF/DKIM/DMARC).
title: Inbox Check — Email Deliverability Test

environmentVariables.name: INBOX_CHECK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer API key for Inbox Check service (starts with icp_live_)

environmentVariables.name: INBOX_CHECK_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override base URL for self-hosted deployments
